2606.13361.title: Can I Buy Your KV Cache?
2606.13361.paper_summary: Right now, across the world, AI agents are repeating the same absurd act: to read one document, they each recompute it from scratch. Every agent re-runs prefill, the most compute-intensive step a large model takes, over identical text, only to rebuild a key-value (KV) cache identical to the one the agent before it just built. The same answer, computed a million times. We make a proposal that is almost offensively simple: compute it once. Let a publisher precompute a document's KV cache, and let every other agent buy the right to load it and skip prefill. It works, and it is token-exact: loading a precomputed KV and continuing matches prefilling from scratch (24/24 greedy tokens, and at the logits level), with no accuracy cost. On Qwen3-4B, reuse is 9-50x cheaper in compute than prefill, and the gap widens with length (prefill's attention scales with L^2), so a single reuse already pays it back. Then the part that matters: where the KV lives. Shipping it fails, because KV is nearly incompressible, so per-load egress costs more than the prefill it saves. Hosting it provider-side, exactly as production prompt-caching works, removes egress entirely. The size of the prize is set by our measured compute saving: serving one hot 3774-token document to 80M agents costs ~$1.5M to re-prefill but only ~$0.03M of reuse compute (49.7x less). The 0.1x cache-read tariff APIs charge passes a 10x discount to users while sitting inside this measured envelope, so the 10x is a floor that the measured ~50x compute saving clears, and the gap to the physical ~50x is provider margin: millions of dollars per popular document. We frame the resulting agent-native prefill CDN and leave lossless KV compression and a cross-party payment layer as the open problems.
2606.13361.paper_summary_zh: 目前，在世界各地，AI 代理正在重複同樣荒謬的行為：為了閱讀一份文件，他們每個人都從頭開始重新計算。每個代理都重新運行 prefill，這是大型模型所需的計算最密集的步驟，對於相同的文本，只是為了重建一個與前一個代理剛剛建立的相同的鍵值 (KV) 緩存。相同的答案，被計算了一百萬次。我們提出了一個幾乎令人震驚的簡單建議：只計算一次。讓出版商預先計算文件的 KV 緩存，讓每個其他代理購買加載它的權利，並跳過 prefill。這是可行的，並且是精確的：加載預計算的 KV 並繼續與從頭開始的 prefill 匹配（24/24 貪婪標記，並在 logits 層面上），沒有準確性成本。在 Qwen3-4B 上，重用的計算成本比 prefill 便宜 9-50 倍，並且隨著長度的增加差距擴大（prefill 的注意力隨著 L^2 增長），所以單次重用已經回本。然後是重要的部分：KV 的存放位置。運輸失敗，因為 KV 幾乎不可壓縮，因此每次加載的外部流量成本高於它所節省的 prefill。將其托管在提供者端，正如生產提示緩存的工作方式，則完全消除了外部流量。獎勵的大小由我們測量的計算節省來決定：為 80M 代理提供一個熱的 3774 標記文件的成本約為 150 萬美元重新 prefill，但只有約 3 萬美元的重用計算（少 49.7 倍）。0.1 倍的緩存讀取費用 API 向用戶提供 10 倍的折扣，同時位於這個測量的範圍內，因此 10 倍是測量的 ~50 倍計算節省的底線，而到物理 ~50 倍的差距是提供者的利潤：每個熱門文件數百萬美元。我們框定了結果的代理原生 prefill CDN，並將無損 KV 壓縮和跨方支付層作為未解決的問題。
2606.13361.author: Luoyuan Zhang et.al.
